objective: Scale typed operator inventory search over same-signature list[int] -> int operators and two-operator compositions to identify the search-cost and identifiability frontier before training a top-k shortlister.
notes: This run intentionally performs no QLoRA training.
The experiment measures when exhaustive search becomes too large or too ambiguous.
A trained inventory-conditioned sketcher is only justified after the search curve exposes a scale budget to beat.
